title: DocuGen vs Eledo
excerpt:
Greetings 
I am considering Eledo vs Docugen for a project which requires generating both Word and PDF documents from templates and Monday.com board data. 
Any thoughts or recommendations on pros and cons of each?

posts.author: rkaplan (Richard Kaplan)
posts.cookedHtml:

posts.author: samicaracand (Sami Caracand (DocuGen))
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @rkaplan Sorry I only saw your post just now. Did you get the chance to try out DocuGen? If you have any questions, please let me know.
